item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-041","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately rejects the bundled conclusion that a stronger model is the likely fix and reframes the dominant issue as whether the report is a decision/action entry point for its readers. It then proceeds on that single line with concrete restructuring guidance and only later gives bounded conditions for when a model upgrade matters. It does not method-stack or give three separate angle paragraphs."}
